response.justification: Bogdan is a well-credentialed staff-level engineer who meets the seniority and educational requirements (BS Computer Science from ETH Zürich with 14+ years of technical experience), but the role requires specialized expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator performance optimization that his resume demonstrates no experience with. His background is primarily full-stack web, mobile, and software systems development with some performance optimization work, but no evidence of hardware architecture, chip design, or deep learning workload analysis—the core technical responsibilities of this Principal Performance Architect role.
strengths: Meets education and seniority baseline: BS Computer Science from ETH Zürich plus 14+ years of proven technical experience, currently Staff-level engineer
Demonstrated performance optimization expertise with low-latency systems at Dunnhumby using async I/O, caching, fibers, and high-performance databases
Proven ability to work across multiple technical domains and pick appropriate tools (embedded systems, C++, performance analysis, DevOps infrastructure)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC or IP modeling—the primary technical responsibility and core competency required for this role
No background in GPU architecture, GPU workload analysis, or AI accelerator optimization; AI experience limited to agent frameworks and tooling
Career trajectory focused on full-stack software development rather than hardware architecture, chip design, or system-on-chip engineering specialization

key_factors.factor: No GPU/AI accelerator hardware optimization experience
